doc.field: Collection processed by Finding aid prepared by Alta Macadam
Subseries B: The Interior and the Collection
5 Historic Albums mostly of the interior and works of art at present in the Collection or probably formerly once belonging to it.
Subseries B: The Interior and the Collection
5 Historic Albums mostly of the interior and works of art at present in the Collection or probably formerly once belonging to it.

This is in the numbered series of albums, but is much smaller than the other eight and not canvas-bound. It bears the label of the Cartoleria Pistoj, Via Condotta, Firenze on the inside cover. All the photographs are pasted on to the page. The pages are not numbered but many of the photographs are numbered on the page. For easy reference the album pages have been numbered by the archivist in pencil on the top right-hand corner. Many of the sculptures were photographed in the same room (presumably the Sala da Pranzo) in the same position (with the painting of the Coronation of the Virgin, XXXII. A.11. visible in the background

Series II: Villa La Pietra >> Subseries B: The Interior and the Collection >> 5 Historic Albums mostly of the interior and works of art at present in the Collection or probably formerly once belonging to it. >> Folder 2. Album labelled "VIII Sculture"
Subseries B: The Interior and the Collection
5 Historic Albums mostly of the interior and works of art at present in the Collection or probably formerly once belonging to it.
